Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms on Details tab
Expected Result: Account record opens; Details tab loads; soft-fail warning logged to console if either field is blank; page header remains visible (test never hard-fails)

Scenario: Create a new Contact for the Account when no Contact exists in the Related list
Expected Result: New Contact modal opens, First Name and Last Name filled via SFUtils.fillName, record saved and Contact detail page confirmed

Scenario: Create Opportunity from the Contact record using the New Opportunity action
Expected Result: Opportunity modal filled with Name, Close Date, Stage; record saved; Opportunity page header with correct name is visible

Scenario: Verify newly created Contact is assigned as Primary Contact Role on the Opportunity
Expected Result: Opportunity Related tab shows Contact Roles section; Contact row present; Primary indicator visible; if missing, Edit modal used to set Primary and saved

Scenario: Verify Account Billing Address and Payment Terms are present under the Details tab
Expected Result: Fields are visible; soft-fail warning logged if either field is absent — test continues

Scenario: Create a new Contact record linked to an existing Account when no Contact exists
Expected Result: Contact is saved successfully, detail page loads, Name and Account Name fields are populated

Scenario: Create a new Opportunity from the Contact's Related tab Opportunities list
Expected Result: Opportunity is saved and its detail page loads with the correct Opportunity Name visible

Scenario: Verify the newly created Contact is assigned as Primary Contact Role on the Opportunity
Expected Result: Contact appears in the Contact Roles related list with Primary indicator present

Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms under Details tab (soft-fail if missing)
Expected Result: Both fields are visible on the Details tab; missing fields emit a console warning but do not hard-fail the run

Scenario: Check whether a Contact exists for the Account; create a new Contact record if one is absent
Expected Result: New Contact is created and visible on the Account's Contacts related list

Scenario: Open the Contact record and create a new Opportunity from the Contact's perspective
Expected Result: Opportunity record is saved and the detail page loads successfully

Scenario: Navigate to the newly created Opportunity and verify the Contact appears in Contact Roles as Primary
Expected Result: Contact is listed in the Contact Roles related list with Primary role

Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms under the Details tab (soft-fail if missing)
Expected Result: Billing Address and Payment Terms fields are present and non-empty; test logs a SOFT-FAIL warning but does not block execution if either field is absent

Scenario: Create a new Contact for the Account when no Contact exists
Expected Result: New Contact record is saved and visible, linked to the parent Account

Scenario: Create a new Opportunity from the Contact record's Related tab
Expected Result: Opportunity record is created and navigated to; heading matches the expected Opportunity name

Scenario: Verify the newly created Contact is assigned as the Primary Contact Role on the Opportunity
Expected Result: Contact Roles related list on the Opportunity contains the Contact with the Primary flag set
